tracks.meaning: to become tired or weak in energy or enthusiasm
a banner or piece of fabric bearing a symbol, emblem, or design
a binary indicator or marker used to signal a particular status or condition in a program
a distinctive stone marker or post placed to indicate a boundary or route
to call attention to something or bring it to someone's notice
to mark or label something as evidence or for official identification
a pennant or symbol used to represent a military unit or nation
in sports, a yellow or red card issued by a referee as a caution or dismissal
to mark a player or opponent closely during defensive play
to mark a piece of content online for later retrieval or to indicate it as inappropriate
